ogTitle: Yambuna vs Yan Yean: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Yambuna and Yan Yean.
heading: Yambuna vs Yan Yean — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yambuna, Victoria and Yan Yean, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yambuna has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Yan Yean (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yambuna or Yan Yean safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yambuna has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Yan Yean scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yambuna scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Yan Yean scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yambuna or Yan Yean?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yambuna has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
